case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. PIERRE A TCHIKOVANI et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT TCHIKOVANI, PIERRE A DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-03-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-27-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-18-2008

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TCHIKOVANI, PIERRE A $6,448.44 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,094.40 INTEREST, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,582.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT; COMPUTATION OF INTEREST; NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP 1033(B)(2) AND ATTY. FEES PURSANT TO CC 1717 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10
